formula: F1 = w_clm * Phi_clm + w_eeg * Phi_eeg + w_akida * Phi_akida + w_org * Phi_org + w_loihi * Phi_loihi

FAIL.f1_effect: F1 reports substrate-dependent verdict; w_org redistributed pro-rata

release_gate.policy: F1 v0 ships with w_org=0 if N-11 not complete by CP2 cutoff; N-11 PASS upgrades to F1 v1 versioned re-release

rationale: biological wetware substrate weighted equal to digital LLM and EEG primary baselines per N-substrate batch policy of substrate-class-equal weighting; loihi reduced pre-arrival; akida reduced as digital SNN sibling rather than novel substrate class
